claim_bullets.bullet_text: Players act out roles in a fictional world, with one game master facilitating the scenario (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7).
Rulebook provides framework for character creation, combat, magic, and skill checks (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7).
Rulebook has five major parts: introduction, player section, game master section, optional rules, guide to Forcelia and Alecrast (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7).

source_record_text: Introduction to the Sword World RPG - Complete Edition rulebook, covering basics of RPGs, rulebook structure, and game requirements.
